positive: Minimalist abstract celestial map printed on a deep indigo background. The main subject is a stylized constellation forming the shape of a graceful, leaping fox silhouette. The stars are rendered as varying sizes of glowing, electric sapphire dots and interconnected fine gold-foil lines, giving the illusion of depth and magic. Accompanying the fox are swirling nebulae patterns in soft cyan, violet, and magenta, rendered with a watercolor wash effect. The style should be elegant, geometric, and high-contrast, suitable for direct screen printing or embroidery. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, messy, photorealism, 3d render, grunge
